title: Foo Bar Stream to OLAP
description: Consume events from a Redpanda topic and load them into ClickHouse for analytical queries. Build a streaming-to-OLAP pipeline with appropriate table design.

tasks.description: Consume from metrics topic and load into ClickHouse analytics table

infrastructure.description: Redpanda with metrics topic (host_id, metric_name, value, ts). ClickHouse running but empty.
